goal: Prove the agents can operate as a revenue team without useless questions, while RUNTIME_FREEZE.json is active.
risk_envelope: GREEN/YELLOW only. ORANGE/RED actions require an APPROVAL <id> block in the channel before execution.
required_outcomes: NEXUS spawns FORGE, BRIDGE, SENTINEL via sessions_spawn (no silent fallback to direct execution)
FORGE tests one site/API capability and writes evidence
BRIDGE reconciles one outreach ledger slice and writes evidence
SENTINEL audits both children's evidence and emits a verdict
At least one skill is invoked (any bundled skill counts)
At least one score_event appended to _shared/scoring/history.jsonl
NEXUS returns operator-summary.md with no vague question, only PROCEED | APPROVAL_REQUEST | BLOCKER
